/usr/bin/ar qc libVoxelVK_Elite_ALL.a CMakeFiles/VoxelVK_Elite_ALL.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelVK_Elite_ALL.dir/src/voxel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelVK_Elite_ALL.dir/src/vk_elite.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelVK_Elite_ALL.dir/src/core/build_info_print.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelVK_Elite_ALL.dir/src/core/runtime_debug.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelVK_Elite_ALL.dir/src/core/gpu_compat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelVK_Elite_ALL.dir/src/render/csm_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelVK_Elite_ALL.dir/src/render/csm_pass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelVK_Elite_ALL.dir/src/render/voxelize_pass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelVK_Elite_ALL.dir/src/render/csm_layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelVK_Elite_ALL.dir/src/world/svo_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelVK_Elite_ALL.dir/src/world/svo_io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VoxelVK_Elite_ALL.dir/src/render/svo_traversal.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libVoxelVK_Elite_ALL.a
